visa_types.name: Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Long Term Visa (more than 90 days)]

Important Note:
- Please note all the fees are paid in the visa application center online by using KZ cards. Please call at helpdesk or visit visa application center for more information.
- Visa fees once paid is not refundable under any circumstances including visa rejection.
visa_types.processing_time:
The embassy makes a decision on the application for a visa within 15 days from the date of receipt of the application and the documents necessary for issuing a visa. The period for making
                                                                        a decision on a visa application may be extended up to 60 calendar days in individual cases, in particular when an additional verification of the application is required.
For more detailed information please follow the link to the websites of the Ministry of Foreign affairs of Latvia (https://www.mfa.gov.lv/en/processing-visa-applications-and-prior-consultation).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you plan to stay in Latvia for a longer period (more than 90 days and up to 12 months) on a work visa, you need to apply for a national visa to Latvia at the Latvian Visa Application
                                                                        Center. For all other purposes, to obtain a long-term visa to Latvia, you must contact the Embassy of the Republic of Latvia in Astana.
National visas are issued for the duration of no more than one (1) year. For more detailed information please follow the link to the websites of the Ministry of Foreign affairs of Latvia (https://www.mfa.gov.lv/en/processing-visa-applications-and-prior-consultation).
A foreign national whose visa has been refused, annulled or revoked by the Embassy, has the right to appeal that decision before the Director of the Consular Department of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (https://www.mfa.gov.lv/en/consular-information/appeal-against-refusal-annulment-and-revocation-of-a-visa-and-a-local-border-traffic-permit)
